top_findings.summary: The skill requests unrestricted bash command execution (`Bash(cmd:*)`), which allows running any system command, while its stated purpose is limited to generating network diagrams and providing guidance. This permission level is excessive and poses significant security risks, as network diagram generation tools typically only require specific command-line utilities (like Graphviz or Mermaid CLI) rather than arbitrary system-wide command execution. Additionally, the combination of Write, Edit, and unrestricted Bash access could enable unintended system modifications beyond diagram creation.
